vision_statement: Unlock the power of data to create a better world.
mission_statement: Build and maintain the world's most powerful and widely used software for data analysis and decision-making.
sales_motion: Palantir's sales motion typically involves a consultative approach, where sales teams work closely with customers to understand their business challenges and identify opportunities for data-driven decision-making.
exit_strategy_history: Palantir has a history of successful exits, including the sale of its Gotham platform to the US government.
carbon_footprint: Palantir has set a goal to be carbon neutral by 2025 and has implemented various initiatives to reduce its environmental impact.
ethical_sourcing: Palantir has a code of conduct that emphasizes the importance of ethical sourcing and responsible business practices.

case_studies.title: US Government
case_studies.description: Palantir's Gotham platform was used to support the US government's COVID-19 response efforts.

case_studies.title: Theranos
case_studies.description: Palantir's software was used by Theranos to analyze and interpret medical test results.

sustainability_csr: Palantir has a dedicated sustainability team and has implemented various initiatives to reduce its environmental impact.
crisis_behavior: Palantir has a crisis management plan in place and has demonstrated a commitment to transparency and accountability in the face of crisis.
